view.posts.discover.hint: You can also discover new custom feeds to follow.
view.posts.feed.empty: This feed is empty! You may need to follow more users or tune your language settings.
view.posts.feed.error.badResponse: Hmm, the feed server gave a bad response. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.feed.error.highTraffic: This feed is currently receiving high traffic and is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
view.posts.feed.error.misconfigured: Hmm, the feed server appears to be misconfigured. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.feed.error.notFound: Hmm, we're having trouble finding this feed. It may have been deleted.
view.posts.feed.error.offline: Hmm, the feed server appears to be offline. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.feed.error.serverRequest: Hmm, some kind of issue occurred when contacting the feed server. Please let the feed owner know about this issue.
view.posts.feed.followingEmpty: Your Following feed is empty! Follow more users to see what's happening.
view.posts.feed.offlineFallback: This feed is no longer online. We are showing {#t0}Discover{/t0} instead.
view.posts.feed.remove.error: There was an issue removing this feed. Please check your internet connection and try again.
view.posts.feed.remove.label: Remove feed
view.posts.feed.remove.message: Remove this feed from your saved feeds
view.posts.feed.remove.title: Remove feed?
view.posts.feed.replace.label: Replace with Discover
view.posts.feed.replace.toast: The feed has been replaced with Discover.
view.posts.feed.requiresAccount: This content is not viewable without a Bluesky account.
view.posts.feedback.thanks: Thank you for your feedback! It has been sent to the feed operator.
